name: veda-runtime-v1
description: Enterprise-grade AI execution kernel. Deterministic orchestration, cryptographic audit ledgers, rollback checkpoints, and strict governance for safe LLM agent workflows.
author: Shivam Shrivastav

scripts.build: npm run build -w @veda-runtime-v1/shared && npm run build -w @veda-runtime-v1/sandbox && npm run build -w @veda-runtime-v1/audit && npm run build -w @veda-runtime-v1/runtime && npm run build -w @veda-runtime-v1/pro && npm run build -w @veda-runtime-v1/bridge-veda && npm run build -w @veda-runtime-v1/api && npm run build -w @veda-runtime-v1/web
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/shared-contracts.test.mjs tests/audit-ledger.test.mjs tests/pro-audit.test.mjs
scripts.license:issue: npm run build && node scripts/license.mjs issue
scripts.license:verify: npm run build && node scripts/license.mjs verify
